name: QNI : High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users
notes:
This rule triggers when flow content has an email sender that is not included in the whitelist sends numerous emails. This behaviour can reveal a tentative of massive infection. In most cases, only a limited number of entities are meant to send mass emailing.

Note: The "Whitelisted Email Admins" reference set must be populated with email addresses allowed to send large amount of emails at once.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail in Flows
when the flow matches Originating User is not N/A
when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Whitelisted Email Admins',"Originating User") == FALSE AQL filter query
when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Originating User in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Originating User in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY QNI : High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail in Flows
AND when the flow matches Originating User is not N/A
AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Whitelisted Email Admins',"Originating User") == FALSE AQL filter query
AND when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Originating User in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: QNI : High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users
Event description: Detects when flow content has an email sender that is not included in the whitelist sending numerous emails.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
